name: claude-vision-bridge
description: Inject structured vision context into Claude Code using local VLM providers and optional OpenAI-compatible remote fallback.

ollama_api_key.title: Ollama API key
ollama_api_key.description: Optional API key for the Ollama OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

omlx_api_key.title: oMLX API key
omlx_api_key.description: Optional API key for the oMLX OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

llama_cpp_api_key.title: llama.cpp API key
llama_cpp_api_key.description: Optional API key for the llama.cpp OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

remote_openai_api_key.title: Remote API key
remote_openai_api_key.description: API key for the remote OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint.

allow_remote_fallback.title: Allow remote fallback
allow_remote_fallback.description: Allow image upload to remote OpenAI-compatible vision endpoint after local providers fail.

allow_private_network_urls.title: Allow private network image URLs
allow_private_network_urls.description: Allow localhost, loopback, private network, and link-local image URLs.

allowed_directories.title: Additional allowed directories
allowed_directories.description: Comma-separated extra directories that images may be read from.

denied_directories.title: Additional denied directories
denied_directories.description: Comma-separated extra directories that images may not be read from.

max_image_bytes.title: Maximum image bytes
max_image_bytes.description: Maximum image size accepted by Hook and MCP.

max_output_chars.title: Maximum output characters
max_output_chars.description: Maximum Markdown characters injected or returned.
